case_title: SALMAN, ZIAD AWWAD vs. GODFREY, VIRGINIA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SALMAN, ZIAD AWWAD AS TO DEFENDANT GODFREY, VIRGINIA DOES 1 TO 4 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-11-1999 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-09-1999 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-24-1999

OSC HEARING RE SANCTIONS HELD BY JUDGE ALVARADO. COURT ORDE RED CASE DISMISSED AND ALL PREVIOUSLY IMPOSED SANCTIONS SET ASIDE.

OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY HARRY E RICE, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE AUG-05-1999 CONTINUED FROM JUL-21-1999 TO AUG-25-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-25-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-25-1999, TO FILE POS; OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY RICE HARRY, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING. NO ENTRY OF DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-09-1999 CONTINUED FROM AUG-25-1999 TO OCT-06-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
